name: gdi-foreman
description: Repo-local launch/control template for the two-role GDI/foreman workflow.
guardrails: Do not rely on repo-wide Codex Stop hooks for docked role sessions; use role-local hooks.
Do not automate /goal, /model, /clear, keyboard input, terminal control, or Codex TUI driving.
Do not put source edits or generated run state inside .docks/.
